description:
Analyze the relationship between 'passengerClass' and 'survived' in the TitanicSurvival dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv) using a Chi-Square Test of Independence stratified by 'sex'. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicStratified.omv. Record the Chi-Square statistic (X2) and p-value for both Female and Male groups in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/stratified_results.txt using the following format:

Female_X2=<value>
Female_p=<value>
Male_X2=<value>
Male_p=<value>
